lean.reasoning: NFP strong beat + 93K revisions. 72K OI build (institutional short). VIX 21.5 (risk-off). 200 EMA now ceiling (114 pips above). Warsh hawkish regime. Iran-Israel missile exchange + Hormuz combat = war premium reasserting. Brent back above $95. All forces bearish EUR.
lean.catalyst: Iran escalation overnight. CPI Thursday is the week's pivot — cool miss = 89% ride, hot = validates rate hike narrative.

session.dayRule: Monday — 75% directional match. Best directional day.

terrain.eventProtocol: CPI cool miss = 89% directional. CPI hot = messy, stand aside.

dangerZones.detail: Four waves of Iranian missiles at Israel. Hormuz combat active — US struck radar sites, shot down 4 drones. War premium reasserting. Brent back above $95.

dangerZones.detail: Cool miss = 89% directional ride. Hot/inline = messy. 5.5h post-London = outside Gate 3 window. Week's pivot event.

dangerZones.detail: Expected 2.40% (hike from 2.15%). ECB + PPI simultaneous = Friday session chaos.
